title: YouTube
html_text:

Also Included In

  • View

    Best of Google bundle

    Productivity

Get the official YouTube app on iPhones and iPads. See what the world is watching -- from the hottest music videos to what’s popular in gaming, fashion, beauty, news, learning and more. Subscribe to channels you love, create content of your own, share with friends, and watch on any device. Watch and subscribe ● Browse personal recommendations on Home ● See the latest from your favorite channels in Subscriptions ● Look up videos you’ve watched, liked, and saved for later in Library Explore different topics, what’s popular, and on the rise (available in select countries) ● Stay up to date on what’s popular in music, gaming, beauty, news, learning and more ● See what’s trending on YouTube and around the world on Explore ● Learn about the coolest Creators, Gamers, and Artists on the Rise (available in select countries) Connect with the YouTube community ● Keep up with your favorites creators with Posts, Stories, Premieres, and Live streams ● Join the conversation with comments and interact with creators and other community members Create content from your mobile device ● Create or upload your own videos directly in the app ● Engage with your audience in real time with live streaming right from the app Find the experience that fits you and your family (available in select countries) ● Every family has their own approach to online video. Learn about your options: the YouTube Kids app or a new parent supervised experience on YouTube at youtube.com/myfamily Support creators you love with channel memberships (available in select countries) ● Join channels that offer paid monthly memberships and support their work ● Get access to exclusive perks from the channel & become part of their members community ● Stand out in comments and live chats with a loyalty badge next to your username Upgrade to YouTube Premium (available in select countries) ● Watch videos uninterrupted by ads, while using other apps, or when the screen is locked ● Save videos for when you really need them – like when you’re on a plane or commuting ● Get access to YouTube Music Premium as part of your benefits Note: If you subscribe via Apple, payment will be charged to App Store Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the rate of the selected plan. Subscriptions and auto-renewal may be managed by going to Account Settings after purchase. YouTube paid service terms: https://www.youtube.com/t/terms_paidservice. Privacy policy: https://www.google.com/policies/privacy

Ratings & Reviews

  • 4.7
    out of 5
    47M Ratings

  • 5 stars with a few fixes

    Jan 2

    catdogfive

    The clarity, the speed of the videos sound qualities are all five star. There are a couple suggestions I would like to make, however number one for on screen performance they used to be the three dots at the end of the title area when you’re looking at the review of the video before you start it those dots are gone and those critically allowed you to save the video to the watch later list and several other functions, but you can no longer do that without having your phone connect it up, which isn’t always practical so please put that that capability back on the screen. It would be appreciated. Secondly, can you give a few more seconds like 10 more when you scroll down when a video is on to see what the other shows are before it automatically shuts off and goes back up to the video that gives me more time to read and research what it is and if I want to see it. Thirdly and I’m not sure anything will happen on this one, but I watch a lot of the world news and events that are occurring and this making. Youtubers, who provide videos and news reporting from the front quit making them cut their videos short because you think viewers are going to be upset. That is not the case. People want to see what’s going on you need. to allow people to know the evils that Russia is doing in regards to Ukraine, the human rights violations in countries like China, North Korea, and quit making it virtually impossible for people to learn the truth of what’s going on in the world.

  • I have patience, and it pays off.

    03/04/2025

    Greg (call me G)’ Spot

    A while, back friends of mine that I was just being acquainted with some of my stories. They’re very colorful and insane. Have a channel out there cause even my stories are very immersive. So for like happy year I had a video that were not publicly available ones worked little little worse. I watched myself over and over. Then I would allow someone to watch it and tell me their feedback on. I decide January 1 which is horrible idea because it’s so cold and my supposed to be done outside. And I put up some videos and they’re not even really the way I want them done they’re kind of in the middle, but not quite well published but they’re not my other ex extreme, which is one shot edit no edits to accents happen great..I don’t know if it’s a glitch, but like a lot of views the other day and it doubled and it might not be nothing out for me. I think that’s crazy. Don’t listen to me just make me more enthusiastic now put more out there and I discovered that I really do like making music even if it’s through a simple I do enjoy the whole thing. It’s my mental therapy. A lot of people so I talked to the camera as if possibly I could put There gives me that sense of commodity with humanity and I would say about .1% of the video ever deleted over and over and over I’m only doing it for myself but wanna hear a little bit thank you and I want all kinds of feedback positive and whatever. A great day if you see a pair of glasses, I can’t find mine. I’m asking my friend who so I only have them last, but you won’t talk to me.

    I have patience, and it pays off.

  • Violent ADA (American disability act) and deaf rights

    11/04/2022

    olehssa

    I graduated from Colorado school for the Deaf, June 4, 1990. My bad experiences for last over 32 years. Throughout, 5 states, where, I used to live before, Idaho, North Dakota, Illinois, Colorado, and California. Violent my these rights, including department of rehabilitation and deaf services. California is the one top violent my rights, Fresno DHHSC (deaf hard of hearing speech center) refused to listen my violent rights for over 2 decades. For example, 3 hospitals including Clovis hospital, Fresno hospital, and Saint Agnes hospital. My primary doctor referred to those for my health issues, which, those clinic refused provided me an interpreter and or VRI (voice relayed interpreter). My mom Judi have to interpreter for me throughout those state and federal failures to me. It’s against laws for using my mom to interpreter without state provided. I complaining to DHHSC many many times, state of services refused to listen. I been through college 4 times, which not successful for me through lack of interpreter problems. Few years ago, my last hope that DOR (department of rehabilitation) my counselor named Devin Puente, opened my case again. DOR pay to Advance career institute welding program around $13,000 for 36 weeks, guess what? No interpreter showed up for 3 days, I withdrew welding program. I’m very struggling with my Deaf and ADA rights throughout over 32 years. My mom, Judi witness all kinds of issues, why? My mom is hearing and I’m deaf since birth. Thank you

I complaining to DHHSC many many times, state of services refused to listen. I been through college 4 times, which not successful for me through lack of interpreter problems. Few years ago, my last hope that DOR (department of rehabilitation) my counselor named Devin Puente, opened my case again. DOR pay to Advance career institute welding program around $13,000 for 36 weeks, guess what? No interpreter showed up for 3 days, I withdrew welding program. I’m very struggling with my Deaf and ADA rights throughout over 32 years. My mom, Judi witness all kinds of issues, why? My mom is hearing and I’m deaf since birth. Thank you

  • Stop changing things and bring back the old stuff

    10/30/2022

    bruhicanthaveanicknamw

    I really like it since it has so many options and it’s generally a great thing, and without it would be bad and weird especially on weekends since that’s when I watch it most. But recently it updated and made it so that when you watch a video and click on all the videos made by that channel, it shows the longest videos instead of the most recent ones. And it says “recently uploaded” but I hate it a lot. I cannot see anything new that person has made unless I search up “____ newest videos” and that won’t work either because the search thing is weird though I’m fine with the search. Also, you can’t report videos anymore (even tho I don’t have 2 report videos) and that’s just wrong. The more updates that come means the less I will actually use the app bc I have no idea how to do anything on it anymore. I don’t know why nobody else has talked about this because it’s the closest thing to making me stop using this. I understand if devs want bug fixes and stuff, but this one thing is terrible. Please get rid of this and bring back the line of videos when you click “videos” on someone’s channel, it was infinitely easier to find what vid you want. Ex: I want to watch their recent video. a button for that. I want to watch their oldest video. A button for that. I want to watch their most popular videos. A button for that. And now it’s just the longest videos in the “newest videos” section. Summary: the new update is garbage, please bring back the old page for “videos” on someone channel. Please.

gold_text: YouTube Videos, Music and Live Streams Free . In-App Purchases Get the official YouTube app on iPhones and iPads. See what the world is watching -- from the hottest music videos to what's popular in gaming, fashion, beauty, news, learning and more. Subscribe to channels you love, create content of your own, share with friends, and watch on any device. Watch and subscribe . Browse personal recommendations on Home . See the latest from your favorite channels in Subscriptions . Look up videos you've watched, liked, and saved for later in Library Explore different topics, what's popular, and on the rise (available in select countries) . Stay up to date on what's popular in music, gaming, beauty, news, learning and more . See what's trending on YouTube and around the world on Explore . Learn about the coolest Creators, Gamers, and Artists on the Rise (available in select countries) Connect with the YouTube community . Keep up with your favorites creators with Posts, Stories, Premieres, and Live streams . Join the conversation with comments and interact with creators and other community members Create content from your mobile device . Create or upload your own videos directly in the app . Engage with your audience in real time with live streaming right from the app Find the experience that fits you and your family (available in select countries) . Every family has their own approach to online video. Learn about your options: the YouTube Kids app or a new parent supervised experience on YouTube at youtube.com/myfamily Support creators you love with channel memberships (available in select countries) . Join channels that offer paid monthly memberships and support their work . Get access to exclusive perks from the channel & become part of their members community . Stand out in comments and live chats with a loyalty badge next to your username Upgrade to YouTube Premium (available in select countries) . Watch videos uninterrupted by ads, while using other apps, or when the screen is locked . Save videos for when you really need them - like when you're on a plane or commuting . Get access to YouTube Music Premium as part of your benefits Note: If you subscribe via Apple, payment will be charged to App Store Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the rate of the selected plan. Subscriptions and auto-renewal may be managed by going to Account Settings after purchase. YouTube paid service terms: https://www.youtube.com/t/terms_paidservice. When I'm watching a video and I come out of the app and resume or rewind to a certain timestamp the audio will resume and play but the visual rests at a blurry freeze frame. This doesn't happen all the time but when it does the only thing that fixes it is to go to history refresh, select the video and rewind to where I left off. This doesn't happen all the time but when it does it's extremely off putting Starting with a search that didn't look to promising as the prompt was broad. The search engine was quick and succinct in its found results. The first result was exactly the item that I was looking for. I was able to glean the source that there were additional videos from that producer, that was a plus. The various videos that followed were relevant to the search and added greater perspectives.
